on_interested_reply.step_1: Write reply to data/new_replies.json immediately. Timestamp it.
on_interested_reply.step_2: Classify in data/reply_classifications.json as INTERESTED with full reasoning.
on_interested_reply.step_3: Cancel Day-7 send for this lead (if not yet sent). Use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json (conditional_handling section) — reply in their email thread.
on_interested_reply.step_4: Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h (from reply time — 24/7). Match scope to their signal. Give 3 options (see value_delivery_on_interested below).
on_interested_reply.step_6: LinkedIn: archive trigger fires TODAY EOD for all leads without confirmed LinkedIn — do NOT rely on LinkedIn as a channel for any Batch 5 lead where profiles.json not written today.
on_interested_reply.step_8: Add new entry to batch_5_interested_leads array in this file.

ssl_trades.option_b: SSL + mobile fix — £150-200 one-off (recommended entry point for most Ryedale trades)
ssl_trades.option_c: SSL + mobile + local SEO optimisation — £300-350 one-off
ssl_trades.note: Lead with Option B as the recommended option. Option A as the quick-fix minimum. Option C as the full-service upsell. Rural trades — Option B is usually the right entry point.

no_website_rural.option_b: 5-page site with contact form + Google Business Profile setup — £500 one-off
no_website_rural.option_c: Option B + monthly local SEO — £550 one-off + £75/month
no_website_rural.note: For rural Ryedale with 20+ reviews but no site — Option B is the right pitch. Reference the Google Maps listing they already have as social proof.

aida_high_review.option_a: On-page SEO — title tags, meta, Google Business Profile optimisation — £150-200 one-off
aida_high_review.option_b: Option A + one month of local citation building — £250 one-off
aida_high_review.note: AIDA leads (4.5★+ 100+ reviews) — keyword-gap fix only.

proposal_copy_rules.personalisation: Reference their exact signal and exact URL/issue from Day-0 email. Do not use a generic proposal template.
proposal_copy_rules.framing: Small job, fast turnaround, local specialist. Not 'digital marketing agency'.
proposal_copy_rules.options: Always give 2-3 options — let them self-select. Reduces friction and back-and-forth.
proposal_copy_rules.price_anchoring: Lead with Option B as recommended. Mention Option A as the quick-fix minimum. Option C as the full-service upsell.
proposal_copy_rules.proof: Reference Yorkshire businesses helped — 'I've done this for other local businesses.' Do not name them.
proposal_copy_rules.call_to_action: Offer a 15-minute call to talk through options. Not a discovery call. Not a consultation. 15 minutes.
